Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set No. One, To Stephen Walker
Off Calendar Jan-07-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Roy C. Adams' Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set one, To Stephen Walker is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff Stephen Walker is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $640, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set No. One, To Gladys Walker
Off Calendar Jan-07-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Roy C. Adams' Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set one, To Gladys Walker is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff Gladys Walker is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $840, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2008 Continued To Feb-25-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set No One, To Gladys Walker
Off Calendar Nov-24-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Roy Adams' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, To Plaintiff Gladys Walker is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff Gladys Walker's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff Gladys Walker is ordered to respond and to produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff Gladys Walker in the amount of $840, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
